minimal_callable_path: Import librosa + soundfile + numpy, load the bundled WAV fixture with librosa.load, then compute 13-coefficient MFCC features with librosa.feature.mfcc.
working_directory_assumptions: Run from the root of the copied repro_bundle in a fresh temp directory.
expected_outputs: stdout JSON with sample_rate, num_samples, duration_sec, feature_type, shape, mean, std
contract_checks: shape is a non-empty two-element list
